name: Red Snapper Veracruz
recipeIngredient: 6 Large roma tomatoes, peeled, chopped, and seeded
1/2 cup Dry white wine or water
recipeInstructions:
To prepare sauce; In a large skillet, heat butter over medium heat. Add onions and garlic. Cook until onions are translucent but not browned. Add all peppers and the tomatoes. Cook for 5 minutes. Add olives, capers, bay leaf, and wine. Simmer for 3 minutes. Stir in sugar and cinnamon. Continue simmering for another 2 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
To prepare fish; On a platter, mix flour, salt, and pepper. Lightly coat fillets on both sides. In the same skillet over medium-high heat, cook fillets about 3 minutes per side. Transfer fillets to an oven-safe dish. Pour sauce over the fish. Bake at 325°F for 10 to 15 minutes.
